hero.headline: AI Adoption Starts With People, Not Tools.
hero.sub: We train professionals and teams to understand, use, and grow with AI — in plain language, at their own pace, applied to the work they actually do.

problems.title: You're not the only one stuck here.

items.title: Everyone's talking about AI but nobody on your team actually uses it
items.desc: The tools are there. The pressure is real. But between the noise, the options, and the day-to-day, nobody knows where to start.

items.title: You've tried tools that got abandoned after a week
items.desc: Not because they were bad — because nobody understood them well enough to make them stick.

items.title: You don't need a developer, you need someone to make sense of this
items.desc: AI doesn't have to be a tech project. You just need the right guidance, in your language, applied to your real work.

tiers.label: For Professionals
tiers.name: Squai for Professionals
tiers.partnership: For office professionals who want to use AI in their day-to-day work — no technical background required.
tiers.description: 1:1 training sessions tailored to your role and goals. We start with a free 30-minute discovery call to understand how you work and propose a program that fits. Sessions are in plain language — no tech jargon, no generic content.
items: Free 30-minute discovery call to understand your needs and propose a training plan
1.5-hour sessions booked on demand, tailored to your role and real work
AI tools and prompting techniques you can apply from day one
No technical background required — sessions taught in plain language
Every 5 sessions, the 6th is on us
tiers.priceNote: Per session. Paid upfront to reserve your spot.

tiers.label: For Teams
tiers.name: Squai for Teams
tiers.partnership: Custom AI adoption programs for small companies. Train your team to understand AI and build the habits to use it well.
tiers.description: We start with a free 60-minute assessment call to understand your team and business context. From there we design a custom training program and send a clear proposal within 48 hours. Sessions are run by the squad member best matched to your team's profile.
items: Free 60-minute assessment call and custom proposal within 48 hours
Three fixed packages: 10 hours at 600 USD, 20 hours at 1,700 USD, 35 hours at 2,450 USD
Up to 15 participants per group — teams larger than 15 are split into two separate groups, each billed at the package price
AI opportunities report included in the 20h and 35h packages
Sessions can be recorded — online by default, in-person available at your offices in Manizales, Caldas, Colombia
tiers.priceNote: Fixed price per package. Schedule coordinated with your team.

tiers.label: Implementation
tiers.name: AI Implementation
tiers.partnership: Training is what makes implementation last. We only build with teams that have trained with us first.
tiers.description: Once your team understands AI, knows their processes, and has built the right habits, we can build alongside you. Implementation is only available after completing a training program — because that's the only way we can guarantee the work holds.
items: Available exclusively to teams that have completed a Squai training program
Process mapping, workflow documentation, and AI integrations
Built around how your team actually works — not generic fixes
Scope and investment defined together after a diagnostic session
Contact us to discuss whether your team is ready to build
tiers.priceNote: Contact us to explore the right scope for your operation.

howItWorks.title: How It Works

steps.name: Discovery Call
steps.description: A free call with your assigned trainer — 30 minutes for professionals, 60 minutes for teams. We learn about your work and recommend the right program.

steps.name: Proposal in 48hrs
steps.description: You receive a clear proposal within 48 hours — tailored program outline, sessions, deliverables, and investment. No ambiguity.

steps.name: Kickoff
steps.description: We align on schedule, format, and expectations. Training starts on your terms — online or in-person at your offices in Manizales, Caldas, Colombia.

steps.name: Training Program
steps.description: Live sessions run by the squad member best matched to your profile. Practical, focused on your real work, in plain language — no filler content.

steps.name: AI Opportunities Report
steps.description: Included in team packages of 20 hours and above. A written analysis of where AI can help your specific operation, with clear and prioritized recommendations.

steps.name: Keep Growing
steps.description: After the program your team has the knowledge to move forward independently. And if you want to build — we'll be ready when you are.

howItWorks.subtitle: A clear, structured approach to AI adoption that actually sticks.

industries.title: Industries We Serve
items: SaaS & Tech Startups
E-Learning & Education
Professional Services
Digital E-Commerce
Agencies & Consultancies

items.title: No technical background needed
items.desc: We teach AI in plain language. You don't need to know how to code — you just need to know your work, and we'll take it from there.

items.title: Trained for your real work, not for demos
items.desc: Every session uses examples and exercises from your actual role. What you learn on Tuesday you can apply on Wednesday.

items.title: The right expert for your team
items.desc: We assign the squad member who best matches your team's profile — not a generic trainer for everyone.

items.title: You leave empowered, not dependent
items.desc: Our goal is for you to walk away with the knowledge and confidence to keep growing with AI on your own.

squad.title: Meet Your Squad
squad.sub: Every training program assigns the squad member who best fits your team's profile. You always work directly with real people — not a platform, not a bot.

members.desc: Leads the assessment, designs the custom training program, and guides non-technical teams through AI adoption. Your main point of contact from the discovery call to the final session.
Leads technical training tracks, explains how AI tools and workflows actually work under the hood, and helps technical teams understand how to build and scale with AI responsibly.
Helps teams identify where their current processes can benefit from AI, and trains them to think about their workflows before jumping to automation. Process clarity first, AI second.
Trains teams on how to document, organize, and preserve knowledge so AI tools can actually work with their information effectively. Because AI is only as good as the information you give it.
Guides teams through understanding their data — where it lives, how reliable it is, and what needs to be in place before AI can use it well. Good AI starts with good data.
Trains teams on how to use AI safely — what data should never go into public tools, and how to build good security habits from day one. So your team adopts AI without putting your business at risk.

ctaSection.headline: Ready to start?
ctaSection.sub: A free call, no commitment, no pressure. Just a real conversation about where you are and where you want to go with AI.

sections.heading: Who we are
sections.body: Squai is responsible for processing the personal data collected through this website. If you have any questions, you can reach us at heysquai@gmail.com.

sections.heading: What data we collect
sections.body: When you use our contact form, we collect your name, email address, and the message you write. We do not collect any other personal data.

sections.heading: Why we collect it
sections.body: We use your data solely to respond to your inquiry. We will not use it for marketing, profiling, or any other purpose.

sections.heading: Third parties
sections.body: To deliver our response to you, we use Resend as our email-sending service. Your data may be processed by this provider in accordance with their own privacy policy. We do not share your data with anyone else.

sections.heading: How long we keep your data
sections.body: We keep your data for up to 1 year after your inquiry. After that period, it is permanently deleted.

sections.heading: Your rights
sections.body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. You can also withdraw your consent. These rights apply regardless of where you are located.

sections.heading: How to exercise your rights
sections.body: To exercise any of these rights, send us an email at heysquai@gmail.com. We will respond within 30 days.

footer.tagline: AI Adoption Starts With People, Not Tools.

rescheduleResume.message: You closed your reschedule flow. You can continue whenever you want.
